# terrible_community_general_alerta_customer (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alerta_url` (String) The Alerta API endpoint.
- `customer` (String) Name of the customer.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `match` (String) The matching logged in user for the customer.

### Optional

- `api_key` (String) The access token for the API.
- `api_password` (String) The password for the API using basic auth.
- `api_username` (String) The username for the API using basic auth.
- `state` (String) Whether the customer should exist or not. Both `customer` and `match` identify a customer that should be added or removed.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) Success or failure message.
- `response` (String) The response from the API.
